nasb.text: The border of Manasseh ran from Asher to Michmethath which was east of Shechem; then the border went southward to the inhabitants of En-tappuah.

esv.text: The territory of Manasseh reached from Asher to Michmethath, which is east of Shechem. Then the boundary goes along southward to the inhabitants of En-tappuah.

cnv.text: 瑪拿西的疆界，是從亞設起，到示劍東面的密米他；又向南走，到隱．他普亞的居民那裡。

ccb.text: 玛拿西支派分到的产业从亚设开始，到示剑东面的密米他，再向南到隐·他普亚人居住的地方。
